title: AXChipsLookType
description: Type definition for the allowed visual appearance styles for the Chips component. This is a subset of AXStyleLookType.

sections.title: Chips Look Type
sections.description: A union type that specifies the available visual appearance styles for the Chips component. Only a subset of AXStyleLookType is allowed.

props.name: AXChipsLookType
props.description: Look styles supported by chips (subset of AXStyleLookType).
